snippet: For mailbox status/questions in BOKU context, use exec with Himalaya wrapper first instead of assumptions. Wrapper path: skills/himalaya-boku-lll/scripts/himalaya-boku-lll-wrapper.ps1. IMPORTANT syntax: put options BEFORE search query. Correct: '& $wrapper envelope list -s 50 "from wordpress@usage-ng.boku.ac.at"'. Also valid: '& $wrapper envelope list -s 20'. Do not use query before '-s'. If tool output contains 'Error:' or 'cannot parse', do not claim success: correct the command and retry once.
